infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Atlas needs camera access to detect and describe objects in your environment for vision assistance.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Atlas needs microphone access for audio features.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Atlas needs speech recognition to provide live captions of nearby conversations for hearing assistance.
